author: ROME | wikiwikiwik
content: also it's a bit unclear at this point how the ships will be represented in SAGE, and even if a third party p2p trading app could be developed that works for items in SAGE. My current understanding is that you basically need to deposit your ships into SAGE, where they will remain "locked" behind gameplay dapps until you return the ship to a CSS, repair it fully, and withdraw it. To do anything while a ship or other asset is in SAGE, it would need a sign off from some SAGE contract saying that it's OK to swap this item, and likely need some special swap mechanic because you won't have anything your personal wallet for the ship. Some state inside SAGE dapps would need to be exchanged instead.

author: [AEP] Moustacheride
content: if the pin is stored on the blockchain, anybody could read it and steal the transaction. Or the PIN would need to be something signed by the private key (or a hash of some sort) so that nobody else could spoof it.  But you could probably easily specify a wallet address filter. So that only a single wallet could accept the transaction. If you were going to simply send someone an NFT directly, you'd need this type of info anyway. So it's not unreasonable to specify this. In SAGE UI, it could also be aided by selecting a player in the same region or whatever to fill in their address, or from a friends list.

author: [AEP] MoonMonger
content: I can chime in a bit here and only speaking for myself.  What I would have expected this month is the following: 1) Update on runway.  Doesn't have to be specific numbers or names, just something more than reassuring you are still full speed ahead 2) ANY update on SAGE.  Target still on track and for what month.  Even a quick video would be nice to install a little bit of confidence that the team has a somewhat working product.  This is probably the #1 most concerning to me!!! 3) Any update of Claim Stake staking.  Still complete silence on that. 4) An official TH announcement so that we can at the very least cling to hope that SOMETHING will get announced then. 5) SOMETHING...ANYTHING with the DAO.  I mean how much longer can this keep being pushed out??? 0 Utility for POLIS now for 2 years!  Team has been great about answering super specific questions regarding gameplay that is still potentially YEARS out, but the bigger questions that have significant impact to us now are the ones they always seem to punt on.  Again, only speaking for myself here, but you guys have lost me.  I don't feel engaged anymore, don't feel like I have any idea of what is coming and when (at least with any confidence) and just don't feel as enthused as I once did.  I am only 1 person, but I feel like as somebody who was the #1 cheerleader if I feel this way others must too (and it shows in the lack of Discord engagement).  I spent over a year reinvesting all emissions and POLIS distributions, but for the past 2+ months have been converting them to other projects and will continue to do so.    I still am rooting for you guys and want you all to succeed, but I just don't have the same confidence and conviction that I once did.
